creator: rakuco@FreeBSD.org
text:
Bryan Drewery <bdrewery@FreeBSD.org> writes:

> Full build at:
> http://package18.nyi.freebsd.org/bulk/91amd64-default-pr_183908/2013-11-14_12h39m28s/
>
> New failures:
> http://package18.nyi.freebsd.org/bulk/91amd64-default-pr_183908/2013-11-14_12h39m28s/logs/errors/ktp-approver-0.6.1.log
> http://package18.nyi.freebsd.org/bulk/91amd64-default-pr_183908/2013-11-14_12h39m28s/logs/errors/choqok-1.4.log
> http://package18.nyi.freebsd.org/bulk/91amd64-default-pr_183908/2013-11-14_12h39m28s/logs/errors/amarok-2.7.0_4.log
> http://package18.nyi.freebsd.org/bulk/91amd64-default-pr_183908/2013-11-14_12h39m28s/logs/errors/calligra-2.6.2_4.log
> http://package18.nyi.freebsd.org/bulk/91amd64-default-pr_183908/2013-11-14_12h39m28s/logs/errors/oyranos-0.9.4_1.log

Cool. Those failures are all related to the mysterious automoc crashes
in the build cluster that I have never been able to reproduce. None of
them are caused by this update, though. Will commit the patch to the
tree in a few minutes.
